title: OutfitRecommendation
description: Result of POST /recommend — a daily outfit Aria proposes from the user's catalog (the `propose_outfit` tool). Item references are catalog UUIDs the caller supplied; the backend rejects any id it didn't send. The iOS app and the backend both validate against this; their language-native models must stay in sync.

occasion.description: Short label for the kind of day this look suits, e.g. 'relaxed weekend' or 'smart office'.

color_story.description: One-line description of the palette and how the colors play together.

rationale.description: Why this outfit works — fit, occasion, and styling reasoning, in Aria's voice.

item_ids.description: Catalog item UUIDs that make up the primary look, in the order Aria would describe them (e.g. top, bottom, shoe).

alternates.description: Alternative looks powering 'show me another'. May be empty when the catalog is too small to vary.

ItemId.description: A catalog item id, echoed verbatim from the catalog the caller supplied.

rationale.description: One line on what makes this alternative distinct from the primary look.
